ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "address_line" TEXT /* Address line of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Postal code */,
  "months_at_address" INTEGER /* Months at the current address */,
  "suffix" TEXT /* Suffix (e.g., Jr., Sr.) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the user */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_details" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for income details */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated user */,
  "income_holder" TEXT /* Income holder's name */,
  "income_type" TEXT /* Type of income (e.g., Salary, Self-Employed) */,
  "employer" TEXT /* Employer's name */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Status of employment (e.g., Active, Unemployed) */,
  "work_phone" TEXT /* Work phone number */,
  "net_income_amt" REAL /* Net income amount */,
  "gross_income" REAL /* Gross income amount */,
  "pay_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of payment (e.g., Weekly, Bi-Weekly) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the income holder */,
  "pay_rate" REAL /* Pay rate (e.g., hourly, salary) */,
  "pay_schedule" TEXT /* Scheduled pay dates (e.g., weekly, bi-weekly) */,
  "employment_length" INTEGER /* Length of employment in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_details_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_accounts" (
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for bank details */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated user */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the bank account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "is_savings_account" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account is a savings account */,
  "routing_number" TEXT /* Routing number for the bank */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number for the bank */,
  "direct_deposit" INTEGER /* Indicates if direct deposit is enabled */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name on the bank account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., checking, savings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bank_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_info" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for contact info */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated user */,
  "primary_phone" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number */,
  "phone_type" TEXT /* Type of phone contact (e.g., Cell, Home) */,
  "dnc" INTEGER /* Do Not Contact status */,
  "bad_phone" INTEGER /* Bad phone number status */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "dnh_email" INTEGER /* Do Not Contact Email status */,
  "secondary_phone" TEXT /* Secondary contact phone number */,
  "secondary_phone_type" TEXT /* Type of secondary phone contact (e.g., Cell, Home) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_info_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated user */,
  "reference_last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the reference */,
  "reference_first_name" TEXT /* First name of the reference */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the user (e.g., Friend, Family) */,
  "reference_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the reference */,
  "dnc_reference" INTEGER /* Do Not Contact status for the reference */,
  "bad_reference_phone" INTEGER /* Bad phone number status for the reference */,
  "authorized_payee" INTEGER /* Authorized payee status */,
  "reference_email" TEXT /* Email address of the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated user */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan product */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan (e.g., number of months) */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the loan */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the loan application was submitted */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the loan application (e.g., Pending, Approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES loan_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan payment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated loan application */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., direct deposit, check) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Successful, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_payments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of loan product (e.g., payday loan, installment loan) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan product */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the loan product */,
  "max_amount" REAL /* Maximum amount for the loan product */,
  "min_amount" REAL /* Minimum amount for the loan product */,
  "term_length" INTEGER /* Length of the term (e.g., number of months) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who triggered the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event that occurred (e.g., loan application submission) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
